backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the ICP backend with user profiles, character creation/retrieval, items, and marketplace logic, using access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two frontend features (backend character check on login and silent alreadyExists redirect) to their relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing recent changes to components, hooks, engine modules, and data files.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Abyss Ascendant app that mounts the React root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication, profile setup, backend character querying, local character initialization, and screen routing across all game screens.
frontend/src/components/AbilitySelectMod: Full-screen modal component for browsing, purchasing, equipping, and unequipping abilities, with archetype filtering and slot-replacement logic.
frontend/src/components/CharacterCreatio: React form component for creating a new character, allowing the user to set a name, realm, and allocate stat points, then submitting to the backend via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/CharacterSheet.t: Displays a character's stats, XP progress, derived combat stats, and equipped abilities, with controls to spend stat points and manage ability slots.
frontend/src/components/DungeonRunScreen: Runs and animates a full combat sequence against a dungeon monster, streaming log entries one by one and submitting XP results to the backend on completion.
frontend/src/components/DungeonSelectScr: Screen for choosing a dungeon mode (Catacombs, Depths, or Ascension Trial) with level requirements, and displays a modal for pending loot from the previous run.
Tabbed inventory UI showing the character's inventory, stash, and equipped items, with actions to equip, unequip, and move items between tabs.
frontend/src/components/ItemTooltip.tsx: Renders a styled tooltip card for a generated item, displaying its name, rarity, type, base stats (damage/defense), and affixes with icons and color-coded labels.
frontend/src/components/LeaderboardScree: Displays a mock seasonal leaderboard with Softcore and Hardcore tabs, showing player rankings by level and XP with status indicators for alive/dead characters.
frontend/src/components/LevelUpModal.tsx: Modal dialog that lets the player distribute pending stat points across Strength, Dexterity, Intelligence, and Vitality using increment/decrement controls before confirming allocation.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Full-screen login page with Internet Identity authentication, displaying the game logo, feature highlights, and a login/logout button with animated particle effects.
frontend/src/components/MarketplaceScree: Marketplace UI with Browse and Sell tabs, allowing players to view active ICP-priced listings and list inventory items for sale via backend mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation header showing character info, a tab bar for all major game screens, and a logout button that clears identity and query cache.
frontend/src/components/ProfessionsPlace: Renders a 'Coming Soon' placeholder page for the Professions feature, displaying four crafting categories (Smithing, Alchemy, Tinkering, Gathering) with icons and descriptions in a dungeon-themed layout.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that forces new users to set an adventurer username, with validation (length and character rules) and a mutation hook to save the profile before proceeding.
frontend/src/components/ShrinesPlacehold: Renders a 'Coming Soon' placeholder page for the Shrines of Power feature, showing four shrine types (Ember, Gold, Arcane, Storm) with animated icons and flavor descriptions.
frontend/src/components/XPBar.tsx: Displays a character's XP progress bar toward the next level, supporting both compact (single-line) and full (multi-line with totals) display modes.
frontend/src/data/abilities.ts: Defines the Ability type and a static list of combat abilities across four archetypes (melee, ranged, magic, tank), each with cooldown, damage multipliers, and stat scaling metadata.
frontend/src/data/monsters.ts: Defines the MonsterTemplate interface and a static list of 10 monster types with base stats, plus a utility function to generate randomized display names using prefix/suffix pools.
frontend/src/engine/combatEngine.ts: Implements the core combat simulation engine, including stat derivation from character attributes and equipped items, player/monster attack tick calculations, crit rolls, and combat result structures.
frontend/src/engine/lootGenerator.ts: Defines types and logic for procedurally generating randomized game items (Weapon, Armor, Trinket) with weighted rarity selection, affix pools, and rarity-scaled base stats.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalCharacter.ts: React hook managing a local character's state (stats, inventory, abilities, XP/leveling) with localStorage persistence and helper functions for progression.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profile, character creation, dungeon results, and marketplace listings/purchases.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a dark fantasy design system with OKLCH CSS variables for colors, rarity tiers, glow effects, and custom Tailwind utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/types/game.ts: Defines core frontend game types including Screen, DungeonMode, item/character/combat interfaces, class tier constants, and XP-per-level progression table used throughout the frontend.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with game-specific fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (ember, dungeon-gold, rarity tiers, stone, obsidian), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 11) describing the full-stack ICP hack-and-slash RPG's architecture, existing features, known issues, and build metadata for planning and tracking purposes.
